title: Diabetes annual review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Lists metabolic decompensation, DKA or hyperosmolar state, infected foot ulcer, profound hypoglycaemia, and rapidly deteriorating complications.
red_flags.rationale: Metabolic-decompensation and foot red flags were reviewed as prompts only; no condition or escalation is inferred.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists metabolic decompensation, DKA or hyperosmolar state, infected foot ulcer, profound hypoglycaemia, and rapidly deteriorating complications.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

examination.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
examination.rationale: The exact DHA annual-review section supports interval change, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, measured vital signs and weight or BMI, foot or skin assessment, laboratory and home-monitoring review for adults with type 2 diabetes in Dubai telehealth.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting glycaemic status, current treatment, complications, comorbidities, overall and functional status, support, risk factors, shared goals and continuing-care plans.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact ADA evaluation section supports patient goals, functional impact, focused assessment, previous correspondence, clinician plan, safety discussion and continuing follow-up without generating management.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting glycaemic status, current treatment, complications, comorbidities, overall and functional status, support, risk factors, shared goals and continuing-care plans.

source.title: 4. Comprehensive Medical Evaluation and Assessment of Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 4.3–4.4 — comprehensive evaluation and ongoing management

source_limitations: Diabetes type, duration, exact medicines, hypoglycaemia, monitoring data, HbA1c, BP, BMI, renal, lipid, retinal, foot, vaccination, complication, diagnosis and treatment remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
